name: Color Changing LED Floor Lamp with Remote Control Mood and Ambient Lighting Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Add some ambience to your interior decor by illuminating with the Wall Washer Floor Lamp with Color Changing Lights and Remote from Room Essentials™. This black floor lamp features a stick-like design with a round base for a modern look. It features color-changing lights with a dimmable setting to help you customize the lighting according to your needs. Simply place it in your living room or any other area and use the included remote for operating the lamp.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
